prompt: 我的 B+ tree concurrency 实现在高并发测试时会 crash 或者返回错误结果。单线程没问题。我用的是 latch crabbing 协议。这是我的代码：[C++ 代码，包含 latch 获取逻辑]。是不是死锁了？还是有数据竞争？

assertions.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
Analyzes lock ordering, latch protocol, or stale pointer lifetime instead of generic concurrency advice
Requests a concrete interleaving, lock trace, or minimal reproducer
